message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  ArrowColor Black
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
}

class "CreateClinicalAnalysisLaboratoryUI" as UI {
  <<C>>
}

class "CreateClinicalController" as Controller {
  <<C>>
  +createClinical(idLaboratory, name, address, phoneNumber, tin, testTypes)
  +saveClinical()
}

class "TestTypeMapper" as Mapper {
  <<C>>
  +List<TestTypeDTO> toDTO(List<TestType> list)
  +TestTypeDTO toDTO(TestType obj)
}

class "TestTypeDTO" as DTO {
  <<C>>
  -type
  -collectingMethods
  +TestTypeDTO(type, collectingMethods)
}

class "TestTypeStore" as Store {
  <<C>>
  +createTestType(type, collectingMethods)
  +validateTestType(tt)
  +saveTestType(tt)
  +addTestType(tt)
  +getTestType(tt)
}

class "Administrator" as Admin {
  <<C>>
  +createClinical(idLaboratory, name, address, phoneNumber, tin, testTypes)
  +saveClinical(clinical)
  -validate(clinical)
}

class "Clinical" as ClinicalEntity {
  <<C>>
  -String idLaboratory
  -String name
  -String address
  -String phoneNumber
  -String tin
  -String[] testTypes
  +Client(idLaboratory, name, address, phoneNumber, tin, testTypes)
}

class "Employee" as EmployeeEntity {
  <<C>>
  -String idEmployee
  -String name
  -String function
  -String phoneNumber
  -String email
  -String address
  -String soc
}

class "TestType" as TestTypeEntity {
  <<C>>
  -String type
  -String collectingMethods
  +getTestType()
}

class "Platform" as PlatformEntity {
  <<C>>
  +getClinicals()
  +addClinical(clinical)
}

class "ClinicalStore" as ClinicalStoreEntity {
  <<C>>
  +getClinicals()
  +addClinicals()
}

UI --> Controller
Controller --> Mapper
Controller --> Store
Controller --> DTO
Controller --> Admin
Admin --> ClinicalEntity
Admin --> EmployeeEntity
Admin --> TestTypeEntity
ClinicalEntity --> TestTypeEntity
EmployeeEntity --> PlatformEntity
PlatformEntity --> ClinicalStoreEntity

note right of UI
  CreateClinicalAnalysisLaboratoryUI
end note

note right of Controller
  CreateClinicalController
end note

note right of Mapper
  TestTypeMapper
end note

note right of DTO
  TestTypeDTO
end note

note right of Store
  TestTypeStore
end note

note right of Admin
  Administrator
end note

note right of ClinicalEntity
  Clinical
end note

note right of EmployeeEntity
  Employee
end note

note right of TestTypeEntity
  TestType
end note

note right of PlatformEntity
  Platform
end note

note right of ClinicalStoreEntity
  ClinicalStore
end note

@enduml
